id.description: SKU ID of the item been replaced.

price.description: Shipping price for the item been replaced. It does not account for the whole order's shipping price and is presented in cents.

measurementUnit.description: Measurement unit of the item been replaced. For example, `kg` for kilograms or `un` for unitary items.

unitMultiplier.description: Unit multiplier for item been update.

sellingPrice.description: Selling price of the item been replaced.

name.description: Name of the item been replaced.

detailUrl.description: URL slug of the item been replaced.

imageUrl.description: Image URL slug of the item been replaced.
